creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
Thanks for your submission!

I'm looking at https://github.com/open-source-parsers/jsoncpp/releases, which mentions 0.10.1 is binary compatible with 0.6.0-rc2. But no mention if 0.10.2 also is? I assume so. If so, I have no complaints and the porters may update the port if they find it correct!
